resources.string: This device environment is not trusted
Nofy blocks access when it detects a high-risk environment. That helps protect your encrypted notes and on-device credentials.
Address the issue below, then restart the app. Release builds do not run on rooted or tampered devices, or while a debugger is attached.
A debugger is attached to the process.
The process is being traced via ptrace/TracerPid.
A known Frida server port is listening on the device.
Injected hook or instrumentation libraries were found in process memory.
A known Xposed/Substrate/LSPosed package was detected.
A suspicious preload environment variable is present.
The installed app is unexpectedly debuggable.
The device firmware is signed with test keys.
A protected system partition appears to be mounted writable.
SELinux enforcement appears to be disabled.
Root-related binaries or Magisk artifacts were detected.
A known root management package was detected.
